Some time ago we hosted a Charity Challenge  We’re truly happy to see such an active and passionate community. Check winners  If you found yourself here, DM on TG with your wallets. Thanks for the participation
The work on the WATER well is in full swing  Meanwhile, we’ve also brought in some merchandise
The building process has begun ⚙️

WATER team visited the village of Mgeni Haji in Zanzibar, home to approximately 1,400 residents  The nearest location where water can be fetched is about 4 KM away. Children make this journey daily. We’re constructing a well to bring clean water to everyone in the village
